About Me
Helping Brands Grow Digitally
With 4+ years of hands-on experience
Hi, I'm Christopher Sanawar — a freelance Social Media Manager and SEO Expert based in Lahore, Pakistan. Over 4+ years, I've worked on 100+ projects helping brands build powerful online presence.

I specialize in targeted content strategies, social platform management, high-ROI ad campaigns, and SEO optimization to drive real, measurable results for every client.
